chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 784 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.3087/2021 25-06-2021 Mr. Rizwan Ahmed Ujjan, Advocate for applicant / surety. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant / surety submits that the applicant has filed this application for return of surety on the ground that the applicants / accused, who were granted protective bail for a period of four days by this Court vide order dated 29-12-2020, have been acquitted of the charge by learned Judicial Magistrate-II (MTMC), Khairpur vide order dated 17-03-2021; copy of said order is placed on record. Office endorsement also affirms the same. Learned Additional Prosecutor General for the State accords no objection to the grant of this application. Accordingly, present application is allowed and the office is directed to return the surety after proper identification and verification as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
